title: Actually 3D Furnaces
description: A Vanilla friendly resourcepack, which makes Furnaces in Minecraft more detailed, smoother and actually 3D!
body:
![The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3b527142094e27ea4dd3da078ac204f0dab2f2.png)
____ ##
This is a standalone Furnace pack of
###
____ ###
**More details:**
Each of the Furnaces (Furnace, Blast Furnace, Smoker) has an actually 3D model, that's hollow and uses the vanilla textures to be really vanilla friendly!
‎ ![The Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ad846c2464bf9f47d269736ef632ff87a715f84_0.webp) ##
**The 3D Furnace Showcase:**
| **The Furnace** | **The Blast Furnace:**| **The Smoker** | |:--------------------:|:---------------------:|:--------------------:| | ![The Furnace showcase 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/682bd3cbe9670ba619c3553fb7e8305f996e056d.png)| ![The Blast Furnace showcase 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd910c62b710d44cd707d6e97c6821422c4dd33f.png)|![The Smoker showcase 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f97b18802e88a89897465ccdf49a51b79b93716b_0.webp)| |![The Furnace showcase 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39bc7d5f61f3dac816b4036fcc68bf0c300fac8e.png)|![The Blast Furnace showcase 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893495fdc887d40987bad74ab019676b466870a2_0.webp)|![The Smoker showcase 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c71804becfd4488e7b818117e4b3b836103f42_0.webp)| |![The Furnace showcase 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a8fc7dc8686a1ca58808fdad63a371f960dd95c_0.webp)|![The Blast Furnace showcase 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04bc25f59bbcce3cb3f26ce1b0c97410763d2a4a.png)|![The Smoker showcase 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731e942049a89cb9d8f6ca7d8df84ab15a19cdc8_0.webp)| ###

**CO's Projects Community**
Do you want Behind the Scenes insights, Development Updates and a place to share your thoughts and ideas with me and other members of the community?
‎
‎ ‎ ____ ____
The Future Plans: This is the first pack of my 'Actually 3D' resourcepack collection, which will hopefully expand, adding new & detailed 3D models to existing blocks, and even items in the game! I'm planning to release each sub-pack (like: Furnaces, Workbenches, Ores, etc.) on it's own, while also adding it to the main 'Actually 3D' pack which will feature all my 'Actually 3D' resourepacks in one.
